title: The Whats the Name of that Song Thread
display_title: The Whats the Name of that Song Thread
wikitext:
[]: The "What's the Name of that Song?" Thread             Quote Post by Hexon.Arq » Thu Nov 11, 2004 7:25 pm Any and all questions about the names and locations of music from Evangelion will find a home here. ----------------- Anonymousabe... Can someone give me the name of the first song played during the 4:24 intermission during Death/Rebirth?? It's basically Cruel Angel's Thesis with an acoustic guitar, but I'd like to know its name and which OST it's in. Thanks.

[]:             Quote Post by anonymousabe » Sat Nov 13, 2004 2:40 pm ok, thanks. :)

[]:             Quote Post by anonymousabe » Sun Nov 14, 2004 11:08 pm whats the song that plays with each preview to the upcoming episode. Misato is the one who narrates all the upcoming episode previews and promises fan service lol. whats the name of the song during those??

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Mon Nov 15, 2004 1:08 am Jikai Yokoku

[]:             Quote Post by Dark FireStar » Mon Nov 15, 2004 3:16 pm anonymousabe wrote: fan service

[]:             Quote Post by the_seventh_child » Mon Nov 15, 2004 3:56 pm Dark FireStar wrote: anonymousabe wrote: fan service

[]:             Quote Post by Hexon.Arq » Mon Nov 15, 2004 7:46 pm whats the song that plays with each preview to the upcoming episode.

[]:             Quote Post by anonymousabe » Mon Nov 15, 2004 11:40 pm no, i meant the original Japanese. thanks. and fan service is basically the little sexual flashes that you see in anime. like when Shinji moves into Misato's apartment and shes wearing short shorts and a tight shirt. or when Asuka's skirt flies up on the aircraft carrier. things like that. thats fan service. this is an example of fan service sort of.

[]:             Quote Post by Dark FireStar » Tue Nov 16, 2004 3:12 pm Oh okay I wish that Rei did a lot of fan service :cry: ....(sob)....Oh well ill do what my old buddy used to say "IMAGIANTION" (Makes an arc with his hand and a rainbow appers)

[]:             Quote Post by the_seventh_child » Tue Nov 16, 2004 3:35 pm Dark FireStar wrote: Oh okay I wish that Rei did a lot of fan service :cry: ....(sob)....Oh well ill do what my old buddy used to say "IMAGIANTION" (Makes an arc with his hand and a rainbow appers)

[]:             Quote Post by Hexon.Arq » Tue Nov 16, 2004 6:50 pm THE BEAST II - OST2

[]: Re: The "What's the Name of that Song?" Thread             Quote Post by anonymousabe » Thu Nov 18, 2004 8:44 pm Hexon.Arq wrote: Any and all questions about the names and locations of music from Evangelion will find a home here. ----------------- Anonymousabe... Can someone give me the name of the first song played during the 4:24 intermission during Death/Rebirth?? It's basically Cruel Angel's Thesis with an acoustic guitar, but I'd like to know its name and which OST it's in. Thanks.

[]:             Quote Post by Gilgamesh » Thu Nov 18, 2004 9:44 pm What's the name of the song when the Eva units are getting ready to go into action during episode 12?

[]: Re: The "What's the Name of that Song?" Thread             Quote Post by Reichu » Sun Nov 21, 2004 2:06 am anonymousabe wrote: sorry i tried heady feeling of freedom and the beast II and neither of them was the one. im looking for the FIRST song played during the 4:24 intermission inbetween Death and Rebirth. It is Cruel Angel's Thesis in acoustic guitar. I just don't know the name. somebody out there must know.

[]:             Quote Post by anonymousabe » Mon Nov 22, 2004 5:36 pm Thanks a lot Reichu. Maybe you can send me an mp3 of it if you have one??

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Tue Nov 23, 2004 1:05 am anonymousabe wrote: Thanks a lot Reichu. Maybe you can send me an mp3 of it if you have one??

[]: Re: The "What's the Name of that Song?" Thread             Quote Post by Gilgamesh » Tue Nov 23, 2004 1:22 am Reichu wrote: anonymousabe wrote: sorry i tried heady feeling of freedom and the beast II and neither of them was the one. im looking for the FIRST song played during the 4:24 intermission inbetween Death and Rebirth. It is Cruel Angel's Thesis in acoustic guitar. I just don't know the name. somebody out there must know.

[]:             Quote Post by anonymousabe » Tue Nov 23, 2004 10:36 am Reichu wrote: anonymousabe wrote: Thanks a lot Reichu. Maybe you can send me an mp3 of it if you have one??

[]: Re: The "What's the Name of that Song?" Thread             Quote Post by Reichu » Tue Nov 23, 2004 11:50 pm Gilgamesh wrote: I'll have to look at that, but I'm not so sure that's the one. I thought it sounds a lot like the second song that is played during the intermission in Death and Rebirth.

[]:             Quote Post by anatrok » Sat Nov 27, 2004 1:05 pm I don't know if this counts as Eva music but whats the clasical piece that plays on the menu of the english D&R?
